feature: self-contained VoiceCallSdk facade for sdk_connect voice calls
verified_facts: VoiceCallSdk.liveKit owns CallEngine and LiveKit media lifecycle
CallEngine remains the single source of truth
P2P participant limit remains enforced in LiveKitMediaEngine
Unified callbacks are exposed for user, connection, error, and token events
Signal validation is mandatory on VoiceCallSdk
Secure random call IDs replaced timestamp-based IDs
Example app and README use VoiceCallSdk as the primary integration path
One flaky widget test is intentionally skipped at user request while the suite passes 15 tests
